name: Micro Stream RPG
short_description: A tiny, auto-play RPG for Twitch streamers to engage with their chat. Micro Stream RPG lets your viewers battle through dangerous dungeons and tough enemies, all in the background while you stream!
detailed_description:
Roadmap

Micro Stream RPG is planned to launch early 2025. The game will hopefully release with a minimum of 5 dungeons and more dungeons will be added over time as free content updates. No DLC required. Holiday and timed event dungeons will also release in the future, and players can earn special badges for completing these areas.


About the Game

PLEASE NOTE: This game REQUIRES an internet connection and a connection to Twitch to operate. It is a game meant for Twitch streamers to use while they broadcast, and is not meant to be played in a single-player mode. That said...

Are you a Twitch streamer looking for something fun and unique to add to your stream? If so, welcome to Micro Stream RPG! It's a tiny auto-play RPG that your viewers can engage with while you focus on streaming.

How does it work? After a quick connection process, simply run Micro Stream RPG in the background. While you stream, people hanging out can use a chat command (e.g. "!rpg") to activate Micro Stream RPG, putting them into a mini, auto-play adventure.

Each time they play, chatters will face one enemy after another. Defeating monsters lets the player earn EXP, level up, and progress through the dungeon until they finally face off against a powerful boss. If they can defeat the boss, they'll earn a badge and advance to the next dungeon. If the player runs out of HP and is defeated, their dungeon run will end, but they keep all gold and EXP earned along the way, enabling them to progress farther the next time they play!

Micro Stream RPG takes care of all this for you - no input needed! Not only that, but Micro Stream RPG offers a plethora of customization options that allow you the freedom to implement the game however you want into your own streaming environment, including:

  • Setting various window sizes, and remembering the application's screen position

  • Chroma color and game color options to style the game to fit your stream

  • Game speed option if you need to accelerate the action

  • Queue limits and user entry thresholds to let everyone have a chance to play

  • Custom engagement messages

  • The ability to lock out new entries from chat, for when you're trying to end your stream

If this sounds good to you, give Micro Stream RPG a try! It's a perfect tool for small-to-medium sized streamers to help create an engaging environment for their viewers! Plus, purchase once and you're done! No additional future costs. All future additional content, including more dungeons and holiday events, will be added for free.

Thanks for checking out Micro Stream RPG!
